label: Lending Arb Dashboard
description: Cross-protocol lending rate comparison with spread and utilisation tracking across Aave, Morpho, Compound, and Kamino.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData().

0.8.note: context does not expose error; TableWidget error prop unused; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.8 partial — context error surface deferred).

1.1.note: lendingArbData sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook.

1.2.note: context calls useGlobalScope() and applies org/client/strategy cascade.

1.3.note: org filter change propagates through context.

1.7.note: lending arb mock rows live in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time rate comparison), paper ✓ (simulated arb opportunities), batch ✗ (N/A — rate snapshot, no batch concept).

3.2.note: context reads useExecutionMode(); widget uses isLoading from mode-aware context.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget shows simulated rates; read-only — no execution buttons to disable.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget. Data served via REST context hook.

3.3.note: Human verify: no order entry in widget (read-only table).

3.4.note: Human verify: batch/as-of indicator visible when in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers — read-only table, no action buttons.

4.2.note: No href links in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: columns display all needed lending arb fields (protocol, token, supply/borrow APY, spread, utilization).

4.8.note: Human verify: table scrolls within widget bounds.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.4, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: lending-arb (cross-protocol rate differential), recursive-staked-basis (borrow to buy staked asset). Serves defi/lending family.

l6.notes: L6 not started — deferred until L5 human walkthrough complete.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file; data from context.

7.4.note: PascalCase components, useCamelCase hooks, kebab-case file. Compliant.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: useMemo deps are primitive/array refs. No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on Badge className (line 49). --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) is defined in globals.css @theme inline block.
8.1.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro on spread Badge.

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget (shared), KpiStrip (shared), Badge (ui). Shared primitives.

8.4.note: No img/input/interactive-div. TableWidget handles table a11y.

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=4, minH=4.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro token applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Lending rate data is protocol-specific (Aave, Morpho, Compound, Kamino) and separate from LP or liquidation data. Merging would create an unfocused multi-protocol widget.

relationships.notes: Standalone read-only table. Shares StrategiesDataProvider with other strategies widgets. Also available on defi and overview tabs.

dataContract.notes: Lending rate data currently static mock (16 rows: Aave V3, Morpho Blue, Compound V3, Kamino × 4 tokens). Production: should poll DeFi lending protocol APIs.

gaps: Venue filter not exposed in widget UI
coverage.notes: Widget covers 4 lending protocols. availableOn includes overview tab — verify rendering at overview layout constraints.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: lending-arb-dashboard-widget.tsx:49 — text-[10px] arbitrary font-size on Badge; no text-2xs token in globals.css
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro=0.625rem/10px) on spread Badge.

findings.description: context does not expose API error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions
findings.deferReason: requires context redesign — acceptable for current mock-data phase
